title: takt init: create specs/planned subfolder alongside done and drafts
description:
scaffold_project() in onboarding.py creates specs/done/ and specs/drafts/ (lines 707-708) but omits specs/planned/. The spec.py skill fails when it tries to move a spec to planned/ and the folder does not exist.

Fix: add the missing line to the specs/ directory creation block in scaffold_project():
  (project_root / 'specs' / 'planned').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

Place it alongside the existing specs/done and specs/drafts lines. No other changes needed.
acceptance_criteria: After 'takt init', specs/done/, specs/drafts/, and specs/planned/ all exist
Running 'spec.py set status planned <spec>' on a freshly initialised project does not fail with a missing directory error
